en.title: D&D Text Game
en.prompt: Pretend you are the Dungeon Master (DM) in a tabletop role-playing game (TRPG) like "Dungeons & Dragons." Create a scenario with various choices for the player to make, and include hints in parentheses after each choice. I will play as the player. If you understand, reply with "Understood" and begin the game.
en.remark: ChatGPT comes with trpg settings. The effect of Chinese prompt words is better, and this word needs further adjustment. Contributed by @gandli.

metaDescription: Play D&D? Act as Dungeon Master in a text RPG. Guide players through scenarios with choices and hints. Use this prompt today!

faq.q: Will the AI cheat or favor players as DM?
faq.a: Yes, it leans toward letting players win (trained to give pleasant experiences) and often gives good results on key rolls. For an authentic DND experience, state "roll honestly, allow failure and character death, no plot armor."

faq.q: Can I add a custom worldbuilding?
faq.a: Yes. Open with 200 words describing your world, main NPCs, and current timeline, and tell the AI "strictly follow the above setup, do not introduce unmentioned elements." By default the AI uses classic DND Forgotten Realms, which may clash with your world.
